data.title: Trump Media Plans $3B Crypto Raise Amid Controversy
data.description:
Catenaa, Thursday, June 06, 2025- Trump Media & Technology Group (TMTG), controlled by President Donald Trump’s family, is preparing to raise $3 billion to acquire digital assets, including Bitcoin, according to a Financial Times report. The proposed capital raise would consist of a $2 billion equity offering alongside a $1 billion convertible bond, though the […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/trump-media-plans-3b-crypto-raise-amid-controversy

data.title: Gomble Launches BUILDERS for Community Game Creation
data.description:
Catenaa, Thursday, June 06 2025-Gomble Games, known for the Web3 hit EggDrop, launched GOMBLE BUILDERS, a new creator platform enabling communities to co-develop games, contribute digital assets, and share revenue, targeting mainstream mobile audiences worldwide. The platform invites NFT holders, developers, and meme token communities to collaborate on game content, including asset licensing, gameplay design, […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/gomble-launches-builders-for-community-game-creation

data.title: AB Foundation Grows Advisory Board for Tech Philanthropy
data.description:
Catenaa, Thursday, June 06 2025-AB Charity Foundation and AB Blockchain announced the appointment of 10 new senior advisors to their global advisory board, broadening the foundation’s mission to advance technology-enabled philanthropy worldwide. The newly expanded board now includes nearly 30 prominent figures from five continents, featuring former and current heads of state, international organization leaders, […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/ab-foundation-grows-advisory-board-for-tech-philanthropy

data.title: Uber in ‘study phase’ of using stablecoins to transfer money globally
data.description:
The Chief Executive Officer of Uber, Dara Khosrowshahi, has revealed that the company is exploring the use of stablecoins to facilitate global money transfers. The company is reportedly in the “study phase,” and is evaluating stablecoins as a cost-effective alternative to traditional payment systems for moving money across borders. Uber is aware of the potential […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/uber-stablecoins-to-transfer-money-globally/

data.title: Why Circle Acquisition May Still Be A Good Bet For Ripple Despite IPO
data.description:
Today marks the debut of Circle IPO on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker CRCL. Investors clamored for shares: the IPO was oversubscribed 25 times, implying demand 25 times greater than available stock. That level of interest suggests a valuation near $7 billion
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/06/05/why-circle-acquisition-may-still-be-a-good-bet-for-ripple-despite-ipo/

data.title: Patrick Stewart Backs DeLorean Web3 Car Launch
data.description:
Catenaa, Monday, June 02, 2025-Sir Patrick Stewart has joined DeLorean Motor Company’s latest venture as it launches an on-chain marketplace for reserving its new Alpha 5 electric vehicle, leveraging blockchain technology to reshape how cars are ordered and traded. The initiative, developed in partnership with DeLorean Labs and built on the Sui network, allows users […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/patrick-stewart-backs-delorean-web3-car-launch

data.title: Venom Blockchain Surges to 150K TPS Pre-Mainnet
data.description:
Catenaa, Monday, June 02, 2025-The Venom Foundation has achieved a major technical milestone by clocking 150,000 transactions per second in a closed-network stress test, the group announced last Friday (23). The result positions Venom for its planned mainnet upgrade in the third quarter of 2025. Venom’s CEO Christopher Louis called the performance a breakthrough in […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/venom-blockchain-surges-to-150k-tps-pre-mainnet

data.title: Psy Unveils First Trustless Dogecoin-to-Solana Bridge
data.description:
Catenaa, Monday, June 02, 2025-Blockchain developer Psy has launched the first trustless bridge connecting Dogecoin and Solana, allowing seamless interaction between the proof-of-work memecoin and Solana’s high-speed smart contract platform. Announced Thursday, the bridge enables both blockchains to verify each other’s transactions without relying on third-party custodians. The move allows Dogecoin holders to access Solana’s […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/psy-unveils-first-trustless-dogecoin-to-solana-bridge

data.title: India U.S. Tariff Pact Races Toward 10% Deal Before Trump’s July 9 Deadline
data.description:
India and US negotiators have begun their latest round of trade talks in New Delhi, focusing on cutting farm and auto tariffs, quota-based concessions and a possible average 10% rate. Officials have said an announcement could come by late June as both sides work to meet Trump’s July 9 deadline. The post India U. S
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/india-u-s-tariff-pact-races-toward-10-deal-before-trumps-july-9-deadline/

data.title: In the past 4 hours, the total liquidation of the entire network reached 634 million US dollars, and long orders accounted for more than 95%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to Coinglass data, the total amount of liquidation in the entire network reached 634 million US dollars in the past 4 hours, of which long positions were liquidated for 606 million US dollars and short positions were liquidated for 27.4918 million US dollars.

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Drops Below 2,400 USDT with a 8.00% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jun 05, 2025, 20:56 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has dropped below 2,400 USDT and is now trading at 2,395.399902 USDT, with a narrowed 8.00% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Experiences Significant Liquidations
data.description: According to Odaily, data from Coinglass reveals that the total liquidation across the cryptocurrency market reached $634 million in the past four hours. Long positions accounted for $606 million of the liquidations, while short positions saw liquidations amounting to $27.49 million.

data.title: Uber eyes stablecoins for faster settlements, lower FX costs for global operations
data.description:
Uber is exploring dollar-pegged stablecoins as a tool for transferring funds across its global network, CEO Dara Khosrowshahi said on June 5 at the Bloomberg Tech conference in San Francisco. Khosrowshahi explained that blockchain-based tokens could settle payments faster than traditional correspondent bank channels and eliminate layers of foreign exchange fees.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/uber-eyes-stablecoins-for-faster-settlements-lower-fx-costs-for-global-operations/

data.title: Coinbase will list FARTCOIN and SQD
data.description: According to official news, Coinbase announced that it has added FARTCOIN and SQD to its launch roadmap, and may support related trading pairs in the future.

data.title: Messari Flags XRP’s Silent Rise As A Treasury Favorite—Here’s Why
data.description:
Three publicly traded companies are moving to hold XRP as part of their cash stash, putting real money behind their crypto bets. Webus International wants to set aside $300 million in XRP. Related Reading: Bitcoin Reserve Gets Military Nod, Senator Predicts Explosive 10-Year Surge VivoPower plans to use roughly $121 million. Wellgistics Health has earmarked $50 million
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/altcoin/messari-flags-xrps-silent-rise-as-a-treasury-favorite-heres-why/

data.title: Tesla plunges by 14% as public beef between Elon Musk and Trump escalates
data.description:
Shares of Tesla sank 14% on Thursday, after President Donald Trump told reporters he was considering canceling federal contracts tied to Elon Musk’s companies. The drop pushed Tesla’s value to $916 billion, stripping it of its $1 trillion status and capping off a brutal week that has already seen shares fall nearly 18%. Trump said […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/tesla-plunges-14-public-beef-elon-trump-beef/
